English Definition: A parasitic infection of the brain caused by larvae of the pork tapeworm Taenia solium.
Chinese Definition: 由猪肉绦虫幼虫感染大脑引起的寄生虫病，可导致癫痫和神经症状。

English Definition: A rare progressive brain disorder caused by persistent measles virus infection.
Chinese Definition: 由麻疹病毒长期潜伏在脑内引起的罕见进行性脑病。

English Definition: Toxic effects caused by overdose of colchicine used to treat gout.
Chinese Definition: 由于治疗痛风药物秋水仙碱过量引起的中毒。

Chinese Translation: 鸟氨酸氨甲酰转移酶缺乏症
English Definition: A genetic metabolic disorder affecting the urea cycle.
Chinese Definition: 一种影响尿素循环的遗传代谢疾病。

English Definition: A condition caused by excess cortisol due to a pituitary tumor.
Chinese Definition: 由垂体肿瘤导致皮质醇过多的疾病。

Chinese Translation: 血栓性血小板减少性紫癜
English Definition: A rare blood disorder causing small blood clots throughout the body.
Chinese Definition: 一种罕见血液疾病，会在小血管中形成血栓。

English Definition: A rapidly progressing and severe infection of bone.
Chinese Definition: 进展迅速且严重的骨感染。

English Definition: A parasitic disease transmitted by the tsetse fly causing sleeping sickness.
Chinese Definition: 由采采蝇传播的寄生虫病，又称昏睡病。

English Definition: A bacterial infection transmitted from animals or unpasteurized dairy.
Chinese Definition: 通过动物或未消毒乳制品传播的细菌感染。

English Definition: A rare pancreatic tumor that produces excess insulin.
Chinese Definition: 一种罕见胰腺肿瘤，会产生过量胰岛素。

English Definition: A parasitic disease caused by Echinococcus tapeworms.
Chinese Definition: 由棘球绦虫引起的寄生虫感染。

English Definition: A chronic inflammatory disease affecting blood vessels.
Chinese Definition: 一种影响血管的慢性炎症性疾病。

English Definition: A psychological disorder in which a person fakes illness for attention.
Chinese Definition: 一种通过伪造疾病来获得关注的心理障碍。

English Definition: A potentially life-threatening condition caused by excessive serotonin.
Chinese Definition: 由于体内血清素过多引起的严重反应。

English Definition: A disorder in which adrenal glands do not produce enough hormones.
Chinese Definition: 肾上腺无法产生足够激素的疾病。

English Definition: A condition where a person has two different sets of DNA.
Chinese Definition: 一个人体内存在两套不同DNA的现象。

English Definition: A condition involving abnormal protein deposits in organs.
Chinese Definition: 器官中异常蛋白沉积的疾病。

English Definition: A genetic condition causing recurrent swelling episodes.
Chinese Definition: 一种遗传性疾病，会反复出现严重肿胀。

English Definition: A mitochondrial genetic disorder affecting muscles and nerves.
Chinese Definition: 一种影响肌肉和神经的线粒体遗传病。

Chinese Translation: 红细胞生成性原卟啉病
English Definition: A disorder causing extreme sensitivity to sunlight.
Chinese Definition: 一种对阳光极度敏感的遗传疾病。
